demographics.gender_identity: sexual/gender minority (LGBTQIA+); specific identity and sex assigned at birth not recorded in the source
demographics.living_situation: lives alone at home; a partner has been calling repeatedly this evening

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't stop throwing up, my hands have cramped shut, and I just can't face them tonight—they'll see right through me.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on out of nowhere before I was meant to go out tonight — I keep being sick, my hands have clawed up and won't relax, and I can't slow my breathing down.

symptom_narrative.onset: this evening, in the hour or so before I was supposed to go to a social thing
symptom_narrative.duration: it's been going for a couple of hours now and isn't letting up
symptom_narrative.character: I keep retching and being sick, there's a cramping ache high up in my stomach from all the heaving, my breathing is really fast and I can't slow it, and both my hands have cramped and clawed up so I can't open them
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it's the worst I've felt like this — I'm stuck on the bathroom floor and can't pull myself together
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high up in my stomach, my hands, and my chest/breathing
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on fast before I had to go out and has been constant since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — lying on the bathroom floor is about all I can manage
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about having to go out and be seen tonight, and my phone ringing
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my heart's pounding, I feel like I can't get a proper breath, and my fingers and hands have cramped inwards
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get really wound up and sick before things where I'm scared people will figure out who I really am, but it's never been this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't leave the bathroom, I can't go tonight, and I'm not answering my partner's calls

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing anxiety around social situations, never formally looked into

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I spend a lot of energy watching how I dress and act so people won't guess I'm queer, and I tend to keep to myself to avoid it coming up. Tonight there was an event where I was scared I'd be 'seen', and I ended up like this. I keep feeling like who I am is a burden on my family.

objective_data_offered.value: both hands cramped and clawed inwards, unable to open them (visible on camera)
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen on video only; the cause of the hand cramping cannot be confirmed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: repeated retching and vomiting/dry heaving during the call
breathing looks and feels very fast and the patient says they can't slow it down
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: visual impression only; true respiratory rate cannot be measured over video

objective_data_offered.value: heart feels like it is pounding/racing
